content: We can frame Self-Refine’s iterative no-training self-improvement workflow as a base structure to ground multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid framework that unlocks context-aware self-improvement without the supervision overhead of existing reflection methods. This hybrid system would let the LLM test inconsistent problem-solving perspectives proposed by multi-perspective reflection within each Self-Refine iteration to gradually prune low-quality outputs and converge on more robust solutions.
